text:
Patch of Forest (一坪の密林) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. This card contains a large forest.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Patch of Forest 一坪の密林 - is entrance to an enormous forest known as 'Mountain God's Garden'. This forest contains many different species of creature. Every one of them is friendly and can become attached to players.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.001 :: 一坪の密林 
「山神の庭」と呼ばれる巨大な森への入り口。この森にしかいない固有種のみが数多く生息する。どの動物も人によくなつく。
|-
![Eng]
|No.001 :: Patch of Forest 
An entrance to the huge forest known as the "Garden of Yamagami". The forest is inhabited by many species of animal, which can all become emotionally attached to humans.
|}

Trivia

In the original Japanese name of the card, the part "一坪" (Hitotsubo) could be translated literally as "One tsubo"; which is the traditional base unit for measurement of Japanese area equivalent to approximately 3.306 m²/35.58 ft² or two Nagoya tatami mats (taken to be the modern standard) of about 1.653 m²/17.79 ft².
